svg.title: Real-time YOLO Vision Pipeline
svg.desc: Five-stage pipeline: Capture → Preprocess → Inference → Post-process → Output, with optimization notes at each stage
svg.text: while cap.isOpened(): ret, frame = cap.read() → if frame_count % SKIP != 0: continue
→ resize → infer → draw → imshow → track FPS with time.time()
time.sleep to cap at target FPS
Roboflow export → YOLO model weights (.pt / ONNX) → drop into inference stage
from ultralytics import YOLO model = YOLO("best.pt")
